User.title: User
User.description: Represents Sristy Edu system users (Master Admin, Branch Admins, Teachers, and Viewers)

branch.description: The educational branch assigned to the user

subject.description: The subject name if the user is a teacher

profilePic.description: Base64 or URL representation of the profile image

bio.description: Quick introduction or details about the user

File.title: File
File.description: Represents an uploaded file/archive in the storage system

fileType.description: Extension of the file (pdf, doc, docx, ppt, pptx, png, jpg, jpeg)

fileSize.description: File size in bytes (max 2MB, Sristy SLA Clause 11.2)

fileData.description: Base64 file data or simulated document content text

description.description: Optional file description or learning notes

branch.description: Branch from which the file was uploaded

isApproved.description: Whether the file has been approved by a branch or master admin

approvedBy.description: User ID of the approving admin

Notice.title: Notice
Notice.description: Notice board message uploaded by the Master Admin and visible to everyone

content.description: The detailed markdown content of the notice

uploadedBy.description: User ID of the master admin

ActivityLog.title: ActivityLog
ActivityLog.description: Represents audit logs for events such as uploads, approvals, and deletions within Sristy Family network

actorId.description: User ID of the person performing the action

actorName.description: Full name of the person performing the action

actorRole.description: System role of the person performing the action

actorBranch.description: Branch assigned to the person performing the action

fileSubject.description: Subject category of the target file

fileBranch.description: Initial branch assigned to the file

SystemConfig.title: SystemConfig
SystemConfig.description: Global settings such as shutdown emergency maintenance mode status

isShutDown.description: True if full site shutdown is active

updatedBy.description: UID of super admin who updated it

files/{fileId}.description: Uploaded or archived file resource collection map

system_config/{configId}.description: Site global feature options and configuration map
